When the user/admin does any change for another user, such as changing their role, 
creating a department or team chat and adding a 
scheduling and inviting other users/members, etc. 
The bug is that the application is not implementing real-time data updates 
and relies on manual page refreshes, 
which is an issue with frontend or backend communication, 
possibly a missing or improperly configured WebSocket connection, 
incorrect event handling, or issues with a live-reloading development server. 
The UI needs a mechanism like WebSockets or AJAX calls to listen for server-sent events and 
update the display dynamically, rather than waiting for the user to manually refresh
